description: Baseline architectural dependency and layering rules for clean architecture.

infrastructure.responsibility: Data access and external service adapters.

forbidden_dependencies: direct domain persistence concerns in controllers

contracts.rule: Contracts are transport-safe DTOs; domain entities are not exposed directly through API responses.

cross_cutting.logging: Configured in API composition root and infrastructure; not in domain core.
cross_cutting.validation: Input validation at API boundary; business invariants in domain/application.
cross_cutting.exceptions: Domain and application throw meaningful exceptions; API maps to HTTP responses.

manual_first_phase_rule: Keep workflows manually triggered by user roles; defer automation logic to later phases without changing layer ownership.
enforcement_note: Rules are currently documented conventions and should be enforced with project references and architecture tests in later phases.
